description_long: This is a modern precision rifle featuring a long, fluted barrel and a robust, skeletonized stock. The rifle is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, designed for long-range accuracy. Its chassis appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a ventilated handguard for heat dissipation. The pistol grip and adjustable buttstock enhance ergonomic handling, while a detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver. The muzzle is fitted with a prominent muzzle brake, likely to reduce recoil. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a tactical and utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern, matte black precision rifle with a fluted barrel, telescopic scope, skeletonized stock, and muzzle brake.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle brake and the narrow profile of the barrel and scope.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the fluted barrel, large scope, skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the adjustable buttstock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: A full right-side view displays the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the handguard and magazine.
